== Notes for [[Item:Q81945|Q81945]] ==

'''Nawfal ibn Abd al-Manaf''' (Arabic: نوفل بن عبدالمناف) was the son of Abd Manaf ibn Qusai and Waqida bint Amr, and the progenitor of the Banu Nawfal of the Quraysh, including Mut'im ibn 'Adi ibn Nawfal.


Progenitor of ''Banu Nawfal'' Tribe.

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nawfal_ibn_Abd_Manaf

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abd_Manaf_ibn_Qusai

Source 3: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Banu_Nawfal

----

Nawfal ibn Abd al-Manaf was the son of Abd Manaf ibn Qusai, and the progenitor of the Banu Nawfal of the Quraysh, including Mut'im ibn 'Adi ibn Nawfal.

Died: 510 AD, Makkah, Saudi Arabia
Children: Muṭʽim ibn ʽAdi
Grandchild: Jubayr ibn Mut'im
Grandparents: Qusayy ibn Kilab, Hubba bint Hulail
Parents: Abd Manaf ibn Qusai
Siblings: Hashim ibn Abd Manaf
Great grandchildren: Mohamed ibn Jubayr ibn Mut'im, Nafa' ibn Jubayr ibn Mut'im

----

Abd Manaf al-Mughirah ibn Qusai (Arabic: عبد مناف ٱلمغيرة ٱبن قصي, ʿAbd Manāf al-Mughīrah ibn Quṣayy) was a Qurayshi and great-great-grandfather of the Islamic prophet Muhammad. His father was Quṣai ibn Kilāb.


----
The tomb of Hashim ibn Abd al-Manaf, Muhammad's great grandfather who died in Gaza during a trading voyage, is located under the dome of the mosque according to Muslim tradition.

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
